hero.headline:
From clean code

to the final cut.
hero.subcopy: Web development, design, photography, and videography — built end-to-end by one person who treats every discipline like the main one.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: Full-stack builds — from a marketing site to an internal system, shipped and maintained end-to-end.

design.title: Design
design.description: Brand identity, UI, and print — design that holds its shape outside of Figma.

photo.title: Photography
photo.description: Portrait, product, and event coverage — shot with intent, not just documented.

video.title: Videography
video.description: Reels, product launches, and short-form edits built to actually get watched.

testimonial.quote: Working with RootAnRoo felt like having a whole studio, not a freelancer — the code shipped clean, and the brand finally looked the way it sounded.
testimonial.author: A recent client

contactCta.heading: Got a project worth doing properly?
contactCta.subcopy: Tell me what you're building — web, design, photo, or video — and I'll tell you honestly if I'm the right fit.

Footer.tagline: Code, design, photo, and video — built by one person, one standard.
